message.content:
@startuml
!define CLASS(name) class name #lightgray
!define CLASS_ICON(name) CLASS(name) ..> name #green circle "C"
!define CLASS_METHOD(name, method) CLASS(name) ..> method #green circle "C"
!define CLASS_FIELD(name, field) CLASS(name) ..> field #green circle "C"

CLASS_ICON(Attribute)
CLASS_ICON(DataCategoryAttribute)
CLASS_FIELD(DataCategoryAttribute, "DataCategoryAttribute(enums:object[])")
CLASS_ICON(HashSet`1)

DataCategoryAttribute ..> Attribute
DataCategoryAttribute ..> HashSet`1 : Mapping<Enum>

@enduml
